english_news.title: Two top Walmart executives leave company under new CEO John Furner
english_news.summary: The chief operating officer of Walmart's warehouse Sam's Club, Tom Ward, is retiring while Walmart's EVP of store operations, Cedric Clark, is leaving.

english_news.title: Judge tosses Kilmar Abrego Garcia charges, calls Trump administration prosecution 'vindictive'
english_news.summary: A judge found Trump’s DOJ targeted Kilmar Abrego Garcia after he challenged his mistaken deportation to El Salvador.

english_news.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
english_news.summary: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

english_news.summary: Gabbard who has been largely out of public view during recent US operations says she is leaving due to her husband's illness.

english_news.summary: Alberta's decision to hold a referendum on separation has been widely criticised, including the separatists who say the question is not definitive enough.

chinese_news.title: 新鲜零食品牌「金粒门」加速全国化：粤鄂6店同装｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
新鲜零食品牌争相竞逐新市场。

36氪获悉，新鲜零食品牌「金粒门」近期密集落地全国布局，正式开启跨区域快速发展阶段。近日，金粒门华南首店、湖北首批合计6家门店已经进场装修。与此同时，金粒门华东首店将于5月29日正式入驻南京新街口IFCX，持续布局长三角核心市场。

金粒门相关负责人表示，金粒门将持续加码门店布局，年内将全力推进拓店计划，让更多消费者体验到新鲜短保零食产品与服务。

金粒门华南首店位于深圳龙岗布吉万象汇负一层

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜优步与印度JSW集团达成协议，合作在印度开发及部署电动汽车；英伟达、AMD、英特尔参投，AI初创公司Hark完成7亿美元融资；神舟二十三号发射在即，各系统准备就绪
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

Jefferies预计7-Eleven日本业务营业利润将达2270亿日元，本财年同店销售增长势头强劲

投行杰富瑞（Jefferies）分析师栗山俊介在最新发布的研究报告中指出，凭借在现做食品领域的拓展及有效的营销策略，日本零售巨头零售集团7&I控股（Seven & i Holdings）旗下的日本7-Eleven便利店本财年同店销售额有望实现稳步增长。报告预测，7&I控股国内便利店业务在本财年的营业利润将达到2270亿日元，且在下一财年有望继续增长4.8%。（新浪财经）

chinese_news.title: AI时代核心终端生态定位与用户需求洞察| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
AI不是某一个超级单品的故事，而是一个多端协同的生态故事，消费者的期待与顾虑，正在定义这个生态的进化方向。

AI与硬件的融合分为四个阶段，当前正处于从深度融合走向生态化的关键节点。AI渗透率在手机端已从15%涨到40%，但仍是“加分项”而非“决策项”。未来，AI硬件生态的四个步骤——感知、记忆、决策、行动，或将分别由眼镜、手机、PC协同完成。

以下为演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

赵晓鹏丨NIQ G

chinese_news.title: 江行智能：从感知环境到改变世界：物理AI的机遇、路径与实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
中国工业物理AI的真正优势不在模型参数，而在全球12倍的工业机器人部署密度、两倍的发电量和密集的5G边缘节点——场景密度、基建底座和开源模型的合力，正在推动物理AI从实验室走向规模化落地。

江行智能提出工业物理AI的三层模型，这套系统已在新能源场站和电网巡检场景落地——覆盖贵州、内蒙古等多地，核心算法准确率达99%。陈龙特别指出，工业场景下一个看似简单的巡检任务通常需要拆成100到200个子任务，这对AI的稳定性和可靠性提出了远超消费级应用的要求。

以下为演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 小米YU7家族再推新车，雷军：标准版打特斯拉，GT版狙BBA
chinese_news.summary:
5月21日晚，小米正式发布YU7系列两款全新车型：标准版起售价23.35万元，GT版起售价38.99万元。至此，YU7车系已扩展至5款车型，价格区间覆盖23.35万元至38.99万元。

YU7是小米于2025年6月推出的首款SUV，上市当晚3分钟内大定订单突破20万辆。发布会上，雷军展示了YU7与特斯拉Model Y的销量对比：2025年7月至2026年4月，YU7累计交付23.2万辆，Model Y则为35.8万辆。

从月度交付表现看，今年1月YU7交付37869辆，成为中国汽车市场全品类销量冠军。然而，随着市场竞争加剧，YU7近几个月的交付量有所回落。

在小米的调研中，特斯拉Model Y的订单中约70%为续航593公里的后驱标准版。对许多用户而言，500-600公里续航已足够日常通勤，且特斯拉的五年免息政策吸引力显著，有用户直言该政策相当于直接减免2万元。

雷军坦言，YU7项目初期便规划了类似的后驱标准版车型。“说实话，当时我们认为产品线过于复杂，因此从4款减为3款，砍掉了标准版，这对Y

chinese_news.title: 让智能体看见世界：CV × AI Agent 的行业场景新实践| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
让智能体“看见”世界，不是给它装上摄像头那么简单。当CV遇上AI Agent，乘数效应正在发生。AI Agent不等于Chatbot，真正的价值在于静默看护与自主决策。

AI进入产业腹地仍面临两大鸿沟：视觉认知与行业的理解。为此，大华股份构建了星汉大模型系列——V系列视觉大模型让系统“看得懂”物理世界，L系列行业模型打通业务逻辑。未来“基模+行业Know-how”将成为新范式，而AI的终局不是刷榜，是让每个行业、每个个体都不掉队。

以下为大华股份研发中心副总裁 周文凯 演讲内容，经36氪整理编辑：

investment_theses.thesis: BTC undervalued vs. institutional accumulation + Warsh dovish regime change; position long BTC perps or spot, short Treasury futures to express policy pivot.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk — Institutions tighten grip on Bitcoin; hashrate concentration (F2Pool 11%) in institutional hands
CNBC — Warsh Fed 'regime change' signals clearer, smaller intervention role (dovish read)
Cointelegraph — Crypto Biz report on institutional positioning
Consumer sentiment at record low = Fed likely to ease by late summer 2026
investment_theses.counter_view: BTC recent drop to $77K amid Dow ATH suggests institutional rotation to equities; Warsh may not be as dovish as market hopes; oil spike (Iran war) keeps inflation concerns alive.
investment_theses.expression: BTC/USDT long on spot or 3-month perps; hedge with short TLT (20+ year Treasury ETF) or short DXY calls; ratio: 2:1 BTC long to Treasury short

investment_theses.thesis: Qualcomm (QCOM) underpriced on AI device cycle upside; smartphone AI penetration 15%→40% validates secular trend; long QCOM outperformance vs. SMH (Semiconductor ETF).
supporting_signals: CNBC — Qualcomm on big run; investors waking up to AI device boom
36Kr — AI硬件生态融合加速，手机端AI从15%渗透率升至40% (phone AI penetration 15%→40%)
36Kr — 小米YU7 车系AI功能强化，销量对标特斯拉 (Xiaomi AI hardware gaining traction)
investment_theses.counter_view: Valuation already front-run; TSMC/Samsung foundry competition; China's chip self-sufficiency push (Huawei) erodes addressable market; competition from Broadcom, MediaTek.
investment_theses.expression: Long QCOM stock or QQQ (Nasdaq leveraged to QCOM weight); short or reduce position in legacy foundry plays (UMC, GlobalFoundries); pairs trade: QCOM long / AVGO (Broadcom) short

investment_theses.thesis: Oil/energy rally (Iran tensions + Warsh easing = USD weakness) benefits XLE (Energy ETF) and hurts DXY; long commodities, short USD; energy >50bp outperformance vs. Utilities.
supporting_signals: CNBC — Consumer sentiment plunges on Iran war inflation fears; oil prices spiking
BBC — Putin retaliation rhetoric; Ukraine conflict escalation risk; geopolitical energy premium
CoinDesk — Bitcoin heads lower as Warsh takes over (pivot from strong dollar = energy upside)
investment_theses.counter_view: Demand destruction from inflation; recession fears override geopolitical premium; OPEC+ cuts offset conflict supply risk; Warsh may NOT cut rates as aggressively as priced.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLE (Energy ETF) or individual oil stocks (COP, XOM); long GLD (gold) or DBC (commodities); short DXY calls (3-6 month) or short TLT (long-duration Treasury); GLD/DXY spread

investment_theses.thesis: AI token revaluation (NEAR +50%, broader AI agent/vision ecosystem expansion) will outpace BTC in 2H 2026 if Warsh enables credit/liquidity expansion; long ETH-denominated AI plays, long NEAR vs. DOGE.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph — NEAR protocol leads AI token rally +50%
CoinDesk — Price predictions; AI token momentum acceleration
36Kr — CV + AI Agent 行业场景落地加速，工业物理AI规模化部署 (Computer Vision + AI agents deploying at scale in industrial settings)
36Kr — 江行智能物理AI算法准确率达9X% (Physics AI accuracy >90%); demand for on-chain AI inference
investment_theses.counter_view: AI tokens are hype cycle; NEAR fundamentals unproven vs. SOL/Ethereum; competition from centralized AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic API); regulatory crackdown on token issuance.
investment_theses.expression: Long NEAR spot or 3-month perps; long HYPE (Hyperliquid, native perpetual DEX); short DOGE or pair-trade long NEAR / short DOGE; hedge with ETH stablecoin (for duration risk)

investment_theses.thesis: Prediction market regulatory clampdown (Congressional probe) will hurt Polymarket/Kalshi short-term but create M&A opportunity; existing PredictIt users + institutions migrate to Kalshi (regulated); long regulatory clarity trade.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk + Cointelegraph — Congress launches insider trading probe into Polymarket, Kalshi
CoinDesk — SEC Commissioner Peirce countering synthetic token rule (defensive signal = regulatory scrutiny)
36Kr — 趋势向好，但監管收紧 (Trends positive but regulatory tightening); institutional risk of delisting
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory outcome unpredictable; Kalshi may lose operating license; users defect to offshore markets (Manifold, Metaculus); insiders dump equity before charges.
investment_theses.expression: Avoid direct prediction market equity/token bets; instead long crypto exchange equities with prediction market exposure (if Robinhood adds back, HOOD calls); or wait for resolution and buy post-capitulation; express via political polling uncertainty (if prediction market uptime correlates to policy bets)
